evidence: ACTASAP closes 28 July 2026 at 11:00 and is for UK registered academic institutions.
The programme supports Advanced Connectivity Technologies ideas from the UK academic research base.
Lead must be based in a UK registered academic institution, have an ACT-related idea, have TTO or equivalent support and avoid selective commercial/economic advantage.
Eligible costs are limited to participating academics' salaries and travel/subsistence to ACTASAP events.
Full ADOPT Round 8 closes 29 July 2026 at 11:00.
The lead must be an active farming, growing or forestry business based in England.

Project must have total costs between GBP50,000 and GBP200,000, include a registered ADOPT Project Facilitator and collaborate with at least one other UK farmer, grower or forester claiming grant funding.
The ADOPT Support Hub contact is adoptsupport@adas.co.uk / 0800 987 8006.
ADOPT Facilitator Support Grant Round 10 closes 12 August 2026 at 11:00.
It is for farmers, growers and foresters based in England to engage an external registered Project Facilitator.
Lead organisation must be an active farming, growing or forestry business based in England, able to evidence commercial business status and have a UK bank account.
Project Facilitator must be registered in the Innovate UK Business Connect database.
Queen's public Innovation Programmes page lists innovation/commercialisation contacts for research commercialisation and deep tech programmes.
Ulster Innovation Services supports knowledge and technology transfer, commercialisation, IP, consultancy and confidentiality arrangements.
ADOPT Project Facilitator database and Support Hub are listed; Support Hub can advise on scope, suitability, expertise, partners and on-farm R&D standards.
ADOPTfacilitator@iukbc.org.uk is listed for facilitator registration information; adoptsupport@adas.co.uk and 0800 987 8006 are listed for Support Hub contact.
Innovate UK Business Connect directory states project facilitators can support ADOPT applicants and gives ADOPTfacilitator@iukbc.org.uk for questions.

route_actions.reason_no_direct_submission: Current evidence does not include a UK academic lead, ACT-related academic idea, TTO support or no-subsidy role approval. R&A cannot truthfully lead or claim funding.
Current evidence does not include an active England farming/growing/forestry lead, UK farming collaborator, registered Project Facilitator, trial site, farm business evidence or budget.
